name: Fudge-Almond Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gingersnap crumbs and melted butter; press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Set aside.
3. Beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add almond extract and vanilla extract; beat until smooth.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until the cheesecake is almost set.
9. Turn off the oven and partially open the oven door to let the cake cool completely.
10. Chill the cheesecake for 8 hours.
11. Combine chocolate morsels and melted butter in a double boiler over low heat, stirring until smooth.
12. Let cool slightly before removing from the pan.
13. Spread the chocolate mixture over the cheesecake.
